title: Route to Becoming a UK Qualified Person
alt: Five ordered steps to qualify as a UK Qualified Person, from degree to viva.

items.label: Scientific degree
items.desc: Pharmacy, chemistry, biology or related, with underpinning knowledge.

items.label: Practical experience
items.desc: Min. two years in licensed GMP manufacture and analysis.

items.label: Register & find sponsor
items.desc: Enrol with the joint professional body; pair with a QP mentor.

items.label: Build portfolio
items.desc: Map knowledge and experience to the Study Guide syllabus.

items.label: Pass eligibility viva
items.desc: Structured interview, then named on a company's licence.
